name: Bubonic Trail
explicitMods: Has 1 Abyssal Socket
Triggers Level 20 Death Walk when Equipped
54% reduced Duration of Elemental Ailments on You while affected by a Rare Abyss Jewel
27% increased Movement Speed while affected by a Magic Abyss Jewel
24% increased Reservation Efficiency of Skills while affected by a Unique Abyss Jewel
flavourText: Even the dead serve the Lightless.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Performs a series of quick teleports towards a targeted location. If using the "Attack in Place" option, the direction is reversed. Shares a cooldown with other Blink skills.
explicitMods: This Spell's Cast Speed cannot be modified
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports attack skills.
explicitMods: Supported Skills have 54% increased Attack Speed
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

properties.name: Attack, Melee, AoE, Movement, Travel, Physical

socketedItems.secDescrText: Charges at a targeted location or enemy, pushing away enemies in your path and repeatedly dealing off-hand damage in a small area in front of you. You deal damage in a larger area when you reach the target. The further you travel, the more damage you deal, and the greater your chance of stunning enemies.
explicitMods: 252 to 378 Base Off Hand Physical Damage
8 to 12 Added Physical Damage per 15 Armour or Evasion Rating on Shield
75% increased Stun Threshold reduction on enemies at Maximum charge distance
100% more Damage with Hits at Maximum Charge Distance
129% increased Movement Speed
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.name: Tecrod's Gaze
explicitMods: +19 to Strength

40% increased Main Hand Critical Strike Chance per
Murderous Eye Jewel affecting you, up to a maximum of 200%

+20% to Off Hand Critical Strike Multiplier per
Murderous Eye Jewel affecting you, up to a maximum of +100%
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an Abyssal Socket on an Item or into an allocated Jewel Socket on the Passive Skill Tree. Right click to remove from the Socket.
flavourText: The Hated Slave seeks dominion over his own kind.

name: Ventor's Gamble
explicitMods: +42 to maximum Life
2% increased Rarity of Items found
+31% to Fire Resistance
+11% to Cold Resistance
+48% to Lightning Resistance
8% increased Mana Reservation Efficiency of Skills
flavourText: In a blaze of glory,
An anomaly defying all odds
The "unkillable" beast met the divine
And Ventor met his latest trophy.

name: Coruscating Elixir
explicitMods: 25% increased Duration
Chaos Damage taken does not bypass Energy Shield during effect

Removes all but one Life on use
Removed life is Regenerated as Energy Shield over 2 seconds
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: Let blood sear in your veins,
Let the pain push outwards and turn away your enemy's blows.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports spell skills, making their effect reoccur when cast. Cannot support skills with cooldowns, triggered skills, Brand skills, Vaal skills, channelling skills, skills with a reservation, or skills used by totems, traps, or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.
explicitMods:
Supported Spells gain a Seal every 0.68 seconds, to a maximum of 4 Seals
Supported Spells are Unsealed when cast, and their effects Reoccur for each Seal lost
Supported Skills deal 33% less Damage when Reoccurring
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: "True power grows with patience. You must nurture it.
You learn what it needs. You provide. You wait. Only
then, when it is ripe, does it yield its fruits."

I will see them again, but not until my work is done.

The least I can do is carry you through death.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Animates a melee weapon or armour, attaching it to an invisible Guardian that fights by your side. Animating multiple items attaches them to the same Guardian. You cannot animate unidentified items. Cannot be used by Traps or Mines. If your Guardian dies you cannot summon an Animated Guardian again in that area.

explicitMods: Implicit Modifier magnitudes are tripled

was as intimate and volatile as that of lovers.

+23% to Chaos Resistance

Leave behind those lazy bones;
Dance, ye dead, at my command!
